extortion.description: Legal & Contingency (L&C) is a leading provider of Legal Indemnity Insurance coverage for both residential and commercial properties. With a strong reputation in the market, we offer comprehensive protection via our Ci Online and Bespoke offerings.We are ready to upload 237gb of corporate documents. Lots of employee personal files (passports, DLs and so son), client information (passports, DLs, birth/death certs and so on), hearings, police reports, and other confidential files. Their reputation is not strong anymore.
